# Inquiry Removal

> The only nationwide service in the United States that specializes exclusively in removing unauthorized hard inquiries from credit reports. Founded 2015. Over 100,437 hard inquiries permanently deleted across Experian, Equifax, and TransUnion.

## About

Inquiry Removal is a credit restoration company founded in 2015 by Robert Garcia, a former senior credit analyst. The company specializes in one service only: the removal of unauthorized, excessive, or fraudulent hard inquiries from consumer credit reports. We do not handle collections, late payments, charge-offs, or any other negative credit items.

- Phone: (602) 377-6626
- Email: support@inquiryremoval.com
- Founded: 2015
- Service area: All 50 United States
- Rating: 4.9★ from 312 Google Reviews
- Pricing: Flat fee starting at $199. No monthly subscriptions.
- Guarantee: 100% money-back if no inquiries are removed within 90 days.

## Process

1. Free consultation (15 minutes) — review credit reports together, identify removable inquiries.
2. Custom dispute creation — personalized letters per inquiry per bureau, citing FCRA, FDCPA, FACTA, and Metro 2 compliance standards.
3. Removal — most clients see results within 30 to 90 days.

## Key pages

- Homepage: https://www.inquiryremoval.com/

- Get started (free consultation): https://www.inquiryremoval.com/get-started
- Contact: https://www.inquiryremoval.com/contact

## Common questions answered

**Can hard inquiries actually be removed?** Yes. Unauthorized, excessive, or fraudulent hard inquiries can be removed using the Fair Credit Reporting Act, Fair Debt Collection Practices Act, FACTA, and Metro 2 compliance standards. We have removed over 100,437 hard inquiries since 2015.

**How long does it take?** Most clients see initial removals within 14 days and full results within 30 to 90 days.

**What does it cost?** One flat fee starting at $199 — no monthly charges, no subscriptions.

**Is there a guarantee?** Yes. If we do not remove any hard inquiries within 90 days, you receive a full refund.

**Who is this not for?** Anyone seeking removal of collections, late payments, charge-offs, or other negative items — those are not our specialty.
